testcase.name: test_gstin_valid
testcase.failure:
def test_gstin_valid(): # A valid mock GSTIN (length 15, alphanumeric, ending in checksum) result = check_gstin("27AAAAA0000A1Z5") > assert result["valid"] is True E assert False is True
tests\test_compliance.py:7: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_gst_amount_incorrect

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'mismatch' in 'expected ₹180.00 but got ₹150.00' + where 'expected ₹180.00 but got ₹150.00' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x00000213CBF72130>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x00000213CBF72130> = 'Expected ₹180.00 but got ₹150.00'.lower

testcase.failure:
def test_gst_amount_incorrect(): # Value 1000, rate 18%, amount is 150 (incorrect) result = check_gst_amount(1000.0, 150.0, 18.0) assert result["valid"] is False > assert "mismatch" in result["flag"].lower() E AssertionError: assert 'mismatch' in 'expected ₹180.00 but got ₹150.00' E + where 'expected ₹180.00 but got ₹150.00' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x00000213CBF72130>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x00000213CBF72130> = 'Expected ₹180.00 but got ₹150.00'.lower
tests\test_compliance.py:24: AssertionError
